summary: Decent recording of a solid second set featuring a standout China > Rider jam and a strong He's Gone, though overall energy wanes in places.
review: The show is remembered mainly for its excellent second‑set flow – a mellow yet compelling China > Rider sequence, a superb post‑Dark Star transition and an inspired He's Gone jam. Reviewers note the performance was decent overall but felt the band lost a bit of gas after the preceding three shows, resulting in mixed enthusiasm. No specific comments about the audio source or fidelity were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers praised the second set and highlighted a few songs, indicating a good musical performance (≈3.7/5). Recording quality was not discussed, so it is assumed average (≈3.0/5). Weighted combination yields ~3.5 stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not mention soundboard, audience mix, clarity or any audio issues, leaving the technical quality ambiguous.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set received consistent praise for its smooth transitions and jam quality; overall show described as decent but slightly flagging in energy after the prior three concerts.
